PostToolUse.command: node -e "process.stdin.resume();let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const o=JSON.parse(d);const files=new Set();if(o.toolInput.filePath)files.add(o.toolInput.filePath);if(o.toolInput.replacements)o.toolInput.replacements.forEach(r=>{if(r.filePath)files.add(r.filePath)});if(files.size)console.log([...files].join('\n'))}catch(e){}})" | xargs -r npx prettier --write --cache 2>/dev/null; exit 0
